modules.title: core library
modules.desc: The unified WebGL API: app scaffolding, renderer loops, cameras, materials, geometry, instancing, loaders, animation, props, lighting, particles, post-processing, voxels, procedural helpers, state, and architecture utilities.

exports.name: bakeCurveTexture
exports.doc:
Bake color + alpha + size curves into one 2-row RGBA DataTexture:
row 0 = rgb: color, a: alpha; row 1 = r: size. Sampled in the particle
shaders by normalized age.
exports.summary: Bake color + alpha + size curves into one 2-row RGBA DataTexture:.

exports.sample: function bakeCurveTexture(color: ColorCurve, alpha: ScalarCurve, size: ScalarCurve, resolution?: number): THREE.DataTexture;

exports.name: createCinematicLUT
exports.doc:
Build a cinematic colour-grading 3D LUT as a `Data3DTexture`: a gentle
S-curve for contrast, teal lifted into the shadows and warmth pushed into
the highlights (the classic "teal & orange" look), plus a saturation lift.
exports.summary: Build a cinematic colour-grading 3D LUT as a `Data3DTexture`: a gentle.
exports.signature: function createCinematicLUT(size?: number, { contrast, splitTone, saturation }?: CinematicLutOptions): THREE.Data3DTexture;
exports.sample: function createCinematicLUT(size?: number, { contrast, splitTone, saturation }?: CinematicLutOptions): THREE.Data3DTexture;
